reference: Hello, Doctor. I am in the intrauterine insemination phase now. Yesterday was the fifteenth day, and my follicle size is still eleven point five millimeters with only one follicle. I have been taking Humog seventy-five International Units since June twenty-six, and yesterday I was advised to take Humog one hundred and fifty milligrams. Please suggest how to increase my follicle size.
text: Hello, doctor. I am in the intrauterine insemination phase now. Yesterday was the fifteenth day, and my follicle size is still 11.5 millimeters with only one follicle. I have been taking Humag 75 international units since June 26, and yesterday I was advised to take Humag 150 milligrams. Please suggest how to increase my follicle size.
